title: Upgrade to Row-Level, Data Pages, and All Pages Locking
breadcrumbs: Upgrade to Row-Level, Data Pages, and All Pages Locking
text: Upgrade to Row-Level, Data Pages, and All Pages Locking To use row-level, data pages, or all pages locking, do the following: Add the row level locks , datapages locking , or allpages locking connector options to your assignment file. Add the upgrade locks , upgrade dpl , or upgrade apl connector option to your assignment file, for row-level locking, data pages locking, and all pages locking, respectively. Run the Create Table facility on all modeled database entities. Run the generated SQL scripts. Remove the upgrade locks , upgrade dpl , or upgrade apl connector option from your assignment file. Stop and restart the Sybase SQL Server. Related Links row level locks Create tables with row level locking. datapages locking Create tables with data pages locking. allpages locking Create tables with all pages locking. upgrade locks Upgrade locking for existing tables to data pages, all pages, or row-level locking.
